'''鈭歾-h-ch''' ('''zahacha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monarchize|monarchize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monarchize|monarchize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-h-ch
|-
! Lemma
| zahacha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zahachithi|zahachithi]] || [[word:zahachiji|zahachiji]] || [[word:zahachishi|zahachishi]] || [[word:zahachi|zahachi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahachuthuth|zahachuthuth]] || [[word:zahachujuj|zahachujuj]] || [[word:zahachushush|zahachushush]] || [[word:zahach|zahach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahachuthu|zahachuthu]] || [[word:zahachuju|zahachuju]] || [[word:zahachushu|zahachushu]] || [[word:zahachu|zahachu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahachufuth|zahachufuth]] || [[word:zahachufuj|zahachufuj]] || [[word:zahachufush|zahachufush]] || [[word:zahachuf|zahachuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zahachethe|zahachethe]] || [[word:zahacheje|zahacheje]] || [[word:zahacheshe|zahacheshe]] || [[word:zahache|zahache]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahachothoth|zahachothoth]] || [[word:zahachojoj|zahachojoj]] || [[word:zahachoshosh|zahachoshosh]] || [[word:zahach|zahach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahachotho|zahachotho]] || [[word:zahachojo|zahachojo]] || [[word:zahachosho|zahachosho]] || [[word:zahacho|zahacho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahachofoth|zahachofoth]] || [[word:zahachofoj|zahachofoj]] || [[word:zahachofosh|zahachofosh]] || [[word:zahachof|zahachof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zahach忙th忙|zahach忙th忙]] || [[word:zahach忙j忙|zahach忙j忙]] || [[word:zahach忙sh忙|zahach忙sh忙]] || [[word:zahach忙|zahach忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahachathath|zahachathath]] || [[word:zahachajaj|zahachajaj]] || [[word:zahachashash|zahachashash]] || [[word:zahach|zahach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahachatha|zahachatha]] || [[word:zahachaja|zahachaja]] || [[word:zahachasha|zahachasha]] || [[word:zahacha|zahacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahachafath|zahachafath]] || [[word:zahachafaj|zahachafaj]] || [[word:zahachafash|zahachafash]] || [[word:zahachaf|zahachaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zahachasha|zahachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozahachasha|gozahachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizahachasha|gokizahachasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zahachn眉sha|zahachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozahachnkn眉sha|gozahachnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizahachn眉sha|gokizahachn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zahachsh毛sha|zahachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozahachnksh毛sha|gozahachnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizahachsh毛sha|gokizahachsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zahachrosha|zahachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozahachnkrosha|gozahachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizahachrosha|gokizahachrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zahachmusha|zahachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozahachnkmusha|gozahachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizahachmusha|gokizahachmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zahachsherasha|zahachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozahachnksherasha|gozahachnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizahachsherasha|gokizahachsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zahachngasha|zahachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozahachnkngasha|gozahachnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizahachngasha|gokizahachngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zahachyasha|zahachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozahachnkyasha|gozahachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizahachyasha|gokizahachyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zahachyamasha|zahachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozahachnkyamasha|gozahachnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizahachyamasha|gokizahachyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zahachn眉sh毛sha|zahachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozahachnkn眉sh毛sha|gozahachnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizahachn眉sh毛sha|gokizahachn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zahachn眉rosha|zahachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozahachnkn眉rosha|gozahachnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizahachn眉rosha|gokizahachn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zahachn眉musha|zahachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozahachnkn眉musha|gozahachnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizahachn眉musha|gokizahachn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zahachsh毛n眉sha|zahachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozahachnksh毛n眉sha|gozahachnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizahachsh毛n眉sha|gokizahachsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zahachsh毛rosha|zahachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozahachnksh毛rosha|gozahachnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizahachsh毛rosha|gokizahachsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zahachsh毛musha|zahachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozahachnksh毛musha|gozahachnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizahachsh毛musha|gokizahachsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zahachron眉sha|zahachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozahachnkron眉sha|gozahachnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizahachron眉sha|gokizahachron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zahachrosh毛sha|zahachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozahachnkrosh毛sha|gozahachnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizahachrosh毛sha|gokizahachrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zahachromusha|zahachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozahachnkromusha|gozahachnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizahachromusha|gokizahachromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zahachmun眉sha|zahachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozahachnkmun眉sha|gozahachnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizahachmun眉sha|gokizahachmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zahachmush毛sha|zahachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozahachnkmush毛sha|gozahachnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizahachmush毛sha|gokizahachmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zahachmurosha|zahachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozahachnkmurosha|gozahachnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizahachmurosha|gokizahachmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zahach|zahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙h忙ch|z忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozahach|hozahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙h忙ch|hoz忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozahach|hohozahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙h忙ch|hohoz忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zahach|n眉zahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙h忙ch|n眉z忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zahach|n眉n眉zahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙h忙ch|n眉n眉z忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zahach|n茂zahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙h忙ch|n茂z忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zahach|n茂n茂zahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙h忙ch|n茂n茂z忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzahach|luzahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙h忙ch|luz忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzahach|luluzahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙h忙ch|luluz忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizahach|lizahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙h忙ch|liz忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizahach|lilizahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙h忙ch|liliz忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozahach|kozahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙h忙ch|koz忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozahach|kokozahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙h忙ch|kokoz忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezahach|kezahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙h忙ch|kez忙h忙ch]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezahach|kekezahach]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙h忙ch|kekez忙h忙ch]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
